zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralf Heathcote於1528年出生在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott44歲，母親Mary Catherine Cromyn25歲。他於1567年8月與Juliana Kinder在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1577年3月31日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralf Heathcote于1528年出生在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott44岁，母亲Mary Catherine Cromyn25岁。他于1567年8月与Juliana Kinder在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1577年3月31日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Heathcote
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Heathcote in Hartington (Derbyshire), Heathcote in Warwick (Warwickshire), or Heathcote Farm in Wasperton (Warwickshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. In Yorkshire, this name is pronounced Hethkett.

variants.name: Hathcoat
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcott
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcoat
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralf Heathcote was born in 1528, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott, was 44 and his mother, Mary Catherine Cromyn, was 25. He married Juliana Kinder in August 1567, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 31 March 1577, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralf Heathcote est né en 1528, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mary Catherine Cromyn, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Kinder en août 1567, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1577, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralf Heathcote 1528 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott 44 und seine Mutter Mary Catherine Cromyn 25. Er hat im August 1567 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Juliana Kinder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 31. März 1577 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralf Heathcote è nato il nel 1528 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Mary Catherine Cromyn, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Kinder nel agosto 1567, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 31 marzo 1577, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralf Heathcoteが1528年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcottは44歳，母Mary Catherine Cromynは25歳であった。1567年8月にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドでJuliana Kinderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1577年3月31日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralf Heathcote(이)가 1528년 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Catherine Cromyn(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1567년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Juliana Kinder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1577년 3월 31일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralf Heathcote nasceu em 1528, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mary Catherine Cromyn, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Kinder em agosto de 1567, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 31 de março de 1577, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralf Heathcote родился в 1528 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Catherine Cromyn, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Kinder август 1567 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 31 марта 1577 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralf Heathcote nació en 1528, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mary Catherine Cromyn, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Juliana Kinder en agosto de 1567, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1577, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
